text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
274 
TOT_BENE_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AMT 
LABEL: 
Total Beneficiary Coinsurance Liability Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The total coinsurance amount on a claim the beneficiary is obligated to pay for covered services. This 
amount is the total Medicaid or contract negotiated beneficiary coinsurance liability for covered 
services on the claim. 
SHORT NAME: TOT_BENE_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AMT 
LONG NAME:
